_meta.description: Seed list of Career Technical Education (CTE) centers in Steven's territory. CTE centers serve multiple sending districts from a single location — one CTE adoption pulls sending district relationships with it. High per-deal leverage.
sources: Ohio Department of Higher Education CTE directory (highered.ohio.gov)
PA Dept of Education Career and Technical Centers
IN Dept of Workforce Development Area Career Centers
_meta.notes: Seed is not exhaustive — 76 of the ~200 major CTE centers in territory states are listed. Expand by scraping the official state directories or via on-demand Serper discovery. CTE focus areas vary: IT/CS, engineering, healthcare, trades. Prioritize centers with named IT/CS/cybersecurity programs for CodeCombat fit.
